# Sparkling Stays
> Professional residential and commercial cleaning services in Montreal, Quebec, Canada.
> Serving Montreal, Laval, the West Island, and the South Shore.
> Phone: 438-867-8770 | Email: info@sparklingstays.com
> Book online: https://sparklingstays.com/en/book-now

## Services
- Home Cleaning
- Deep Cleaning
- Commercial Cleaning
- Maid Services
- Airbnb Cleaning
- Office Cleaning
- Window Cleaning
- Post-Renovation Cleaning

## Service Areas
Montreal, Laval, Brossard, Longueuil, Pointe-Claire, Kirkland, Pierrefonds, Dollard-des-Ormeaux, Chambly, Saint-Constant, Île-Perrot, West Island, Saint-Laurent, Boucherville, Ville-Marie, Beaconsfield, Baie-d'Urfé, Westmount, Saint-Hubert, Plateau-Mont-Royal, Lachine, Côte-des-Neiges, NDG, Rosemont, LaSalle, Vaudreuil-Dorion

## Bilingual Service
English and French service available.
